description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts-alpine Docker image. Define three stages (tests, security, publish) and add the following jobs: in the tests stage, a code quality job runs `yarn install` then `yarn run lint`; a dependencies outdated job (allow_failure) runs `yarn install` then `yarn outdated`; and a tests & coverage job runs `yarn install` and `yarn coverage`, captures coverage with the regex `/All files[^|]*\|[^|]*\s+([\d\.]+)/` and stores the `coverage/` directory as an artifact. In the security stage, a security audit job that needs code quality, dependencies outdated, and tests & coverage runs `yarn audit --level high --groups dependencies`. In the publish stage, a package job that needs the security audit runs `yarn install` and `yarn pack`, publishing the resulting `*.tgz` files as artifacts, and a publish job that also needs the security audit runs only on tags or triggers, writes the npm auth token from `$NPM_TOKEN` to `.npmrc`, then runs `yarn install` and `yarn publish`.
